args:
set -eu
for args in \
  '--region prefill_attention --readiness correctness' \
  '--backend-family cuda-graphs --readiness performance' \
  '--cache-namespace flashinfer-autotune-cache --readiness correctness'
do
  plan_json=$(mktemp)
  cargo run --quiet --bin sock -- plan --format json $args > "$plan_json"
  python3 - "$plan_json" <<'PY'
import json, sys
obj = json.load(open(sys.argv[1]))
assert obj['structural_identity']['plan_identity']
assert obj['compile_regions']
PY
done
printf 'fuzz-cli-scope-matrix\n'
